# Dnc!=0.5 filter ensures that rewiring is not due to node missing in one state or the other
top5uc<-rew_cc |> filter(Dnc != 0.5000000000) |> filter(degree > 1) |> filter(disease == 'UC') |> arrange(desc(Dnc))
top5perstateuc<-rew_cc|> filter(Dnc != 0.5000000000) |> filter(disease == 'UC') |> arrange(desc(Dnc)) |> group_by(state) |> dplyr::slice(1:10) |> head(15)|> pull(name) |> unique()
